Not only does the company leadership not align with what I want, the actual products they deliver are getting old and dusty and no longer fit in my workflow- worth the effort to me personally to build replacements by hand and not deal with this company at all, ever

MapBox completely underestimating the effort that the mapmaking community will go through to rid ourselves of a huge, industry-dominating, but unethical and widely-hated company- we even have practice doing it
